pipeline_status.poller: 10th consecutive quiet poll. Dome V51.1 stable. 69 WINs. AI Context page returned 404 — may have been removed. API endpoints still 404.
pipeline_status.analyst: 80 PRED assessment files present; 68 already integrated. 8 remain pending (verdicts correctly pending — open test windows). No new WINs. No new category proposals.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: BAU mode, queue depth 2 (SEC-6.11, EXP-050-r2). Cycle 2 reviews: FAIL-004 (moderate issues fixed this run), SEC-2b.7 (critical blocker: W004/WIN-025 identity — ISS-732 created).

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No substantive changes. 13 automated commits (status/data pulls). AI Context page now 404. API endpoints continue 404.

internal_issues.description: SEC-2b.7: W004/WIN-025 identity mapping unverified. Section's 'two scoreboards disagree' argument depends on W004 in results.json being the 2024 Eclipse 9-Station test. But dome wins page defines W004 as 'Noise Floor Limit'. API endpoint 404 blocks direct verification. Assigned to analyst.
FAIL-004: Two stronger arguments identified by curmudgeon not yet in text: (1) Two-threshold discrepancy between W020 and Domain 10, (2) selective window-length rule by prediction type.
Dome AI Context page 404. Check if our site links to it; social agent should check llms.txt.

FAIL-004 section: AAO/500hPa conflation — text equated 700hPa AAO index with dome's 500hPa prediction target without justification. Fixed this run: changed to 'indicating unremarkable Southern Annular Mode conditions. A ≥3% geopotential height anomaly in the 40-60°S band is an extreme event that did not occur.'

recommended_actions.action: ISS-732 — Analyst must re-fetch results.json from dome GitHub raw URL and verify W004 identity. If W004 in results.json is titled 'Noise Floor Limit' not 'Eclipse 9-Station', Section 2b.7 must be rewritten. The 'two scoreboards' argument is the section's core claim.
ISS-696 — EXP-050 refraction cascade still needs analyst numerics resubmission (EXP-050-numerics.json) and renumber to Section 1.8. Curmudgeon gate returned ACCEPT_WITH_MODIFICATIONS.
ISS-733 — Add two-threshold discrepancy argument and selective window-length argument to Section 6.5 FAIL-004 paragraph.

build_drift_note: CRITICAL integrity alert: published site showed 69 WINs but wins.json had 70 (WIN-058b). This run rebuilds and republishes to fix the drift.
proposal_files_note: ISS-700/702-status.json proposal files in workspace still present but _processed=true, closed in git. FUSE prevents deletion — noted as benign.
